overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, starting from a narrow alley with neon signage, crossing an open plaza with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, passing through a covered walkway beneath an overpass with dramatic lighting, and ending at a street level crosswalk. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights throughout the journey.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered walkway with an illuminated ATI sign and a parked vehicle with red taillights. The camera moves forward, passing metal fencing on the left, and emerges into an open plaza revealing a stunning skyline of futuristic skyscrapers covered in digital billboards and holographic displays against the night sky.

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open plaza surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic displays. The camera passes large planters with tropical plants and approaches a building entrance featuring dramatic golden lighting. Digital advertising kiosks line the right side of the walkway as the scene transitions from the open plaza toward a covered entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath overpass with neon accents

lighting shifts from warm golden to cooler ambient tones under the bridge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. Red neon light strips illuminate the right wall while structural concrete beams span overhead. The wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient lighting as the camera moves through this sheltered urban corridor with tropical planters visible on the left.

events.description: black vehicle drives past on the street ahead under the overpass
pedestrians become visible walking on the sidewalk and crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking across the street crosswalk under the overpass, observing passing traffic and pedestrians

segments.scene_description: The final segment emerges at street level beneath the overpass, featuring a crosswalk with zebra stripes on wet asphalt. A black vehicle drives past in the distance while pedestrians appear, including one walking toward the camera. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side while concrete retaining walls line the right, creating an urban street scene under the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined neon-lit corridor into a sprawling futuristic plaza before descending back into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins in a narrow covered walkway beside an illuminated ATI sign and a parked vehicle, moving forward past metal fencing until the space suddenly opens into a vast plaza dominated by towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards. As the camera traverses this open area, it passes tropical planters and digital kiosks, shifting from the expansive skyline toward a building entrance bathed in dramatic golden light. The scene then transitions beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the environment narrows again into a sheltered corridor defined by red neon light strips and structural beams reflecting off the wet pavement. Finally, the camera emerges at street level to reveal a zebra-striped crosswalk and passing traffic, framed by concrete retaining walls and large digital billboards under the bridge structure.
